text:
What the Synopsis says.  This file hasn't been touched since 9th
	Jan of this year and hasn't been actually updated since December.

Fix: 

A couple options:

	a) Pore over cvs stuff and update/maintain this page.
	b) (more attractive) Nuke this file and the link to it from the
	index page.
